Package project1

package project1
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdminDashboard
    Admin Dashboard - Main interface for Restaurant Manager Privileges: Full access - manage menu, staff, reservations, reports, settings
    CustomerDashboard
    Customer Dashboard - Main interface for customers with RHA branding Privileges: Browse menu, Reserve tables, View reservations, Make payments
    DatabaseConnection
    Database Connection utility class Handles MySQL database connection for the Restaurant Management System
    LoginFrame
    Login Frame for RHA Restaurant Management System
    project1
    Main Application Entry Point RHA Restaurant Management System
    SignUpFrame
    Sign Up Frame for RHA Customer Registration
    StaffDashboard
    Staff Dashboard - Main interface for employees (Waiter/Cashier) Privileges: View orders, Update order status, Handle billing, Manage tables
    User
    User model class representing a user in the system
    UserDAO
    Data Access Object for User operations
